# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Datacenter Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: "Path to the build script to run"
        required: true
        default: "./scripts/build.sh"
      deploy_script:
        description: "Path to the deploy script to run"
        required: false
        default: "./scripts/deploy.sh"

jobs:
  run-build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Make scripts executable
        run: |
          chmod +x "${{ inputs.build_script }}"
          if [ -n "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}" ]; then
            chmod +x "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}"
          fi

      - name: Run build script
        run: "${{ inputs.build_script }}"

      - name: Run deploy script
        if: ${{ inputs.deploy_script != '' }}
        run: "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}"
